texto: While sports are indisputably a positive source of strength and self-development for girls, they can accomplish this only if the environment in which female athletes throw their javelins, kick their soccer balls, and swim their fast and furious laps is an environment that respects girls and takes them seriously as athletes.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Leslie Heywood sobre temas ligados a autoestima. A afirmação “While sports are indisputably a positive source of strength and self-development for girls, they …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, feminism, sports, útil em momentos de sports e women-s-rights.

frase_original: While sports are indisputably a positive source of strength and self-development for girls, they can accomplish this only if the environment in which female athletes throw their javelins, kick their soccer balls, and swim their fast and furious laps is an environment that respects girls and takes them seriously as athletes.
